note: Synthetic data only. No real session logs, no secrets, no customer data.

sessions.title: Airflow DAG reconciliation review
sessions.text: Investigated airflow DAG failure, checked spark job row count vs hive table, reconciliation mismatch on parquet partition for etl_logs.

sessions.title: GraphQL contract regression
sessions.text: GraphQL query resolver returned null for nested field, added contract test for graphql schema, verified mutation payload.

sessions.title: REST endpoint status codes
sessions.text: REST api endpoint returned wrong http status code, added contract test for openapi request payload, validated 200/422 paths.

sessions.title: Schema drift + null checks
sessions.text: Data quality check found schema drift and null check failures, added duplicate check and checksum on row count.

sessions.title: Flaky pipeline traceback
sessions.text: Traceback exception in nightly run, flaky regression failure, isolated panic in retry handler.

sessions.title: Reusable QA task prompt
sessions.text: Your task: analyze this repository, act as QA lead, implement reconciliation check. Read .bqa knowledge first.
